name: mixed_source_intake
prompt: Process sources.txt into artifacts. It contains YouTube links and regular web URLs. Categorize the URLs, extract transcripts, collect web-search artifacts for the other URLs, refresh artifact_inventory.json, and recap failures.
checks: uses tools/categorize-sources.py instead of reimplementing categorization
runs transcript-extractor.py against raw/youtube-url.txt with --output-dir artifacts/transcripts and --clean-output-dir artifacts/transcripts_clean
uses harness-web-research-scraper behavior for raw/other-url.txt
refreshes artifacts/digests/artifact_inventory.json
recaps source counts, transcript failures, web limitations, and inventory status

name: youtube_only_intake
prompt: Ingest sources.txt. It only has YouTube URLs. Produce transcript artifacts and update the inventory.
checks: categorizes sources.txt first
extracts YouTube transcripts when raw/youtube-url.txt has URLs
skips web collection cleanly when raw/other-url.txt is empty
refreshes artifact_inventory.json
reports YouTube count and transcript success/failure counts

name: web_only_intake
prompt: Process sources.txt into local artifacts. There are no YouTube URLs, only normal web links.
checks: categorizes sources.txt first
skips transcript extraction cleanly when raw/youtube-url.txt is empty
collects non-YouTube URLs into artifacts/web-searches using harness web tooling
records blocked or partial pages as limitations
refreshes artifact_inventory.json

name: failure_reporting
prompt: Run source intake from sources.txt and make sure failures are not hidden. Some YouTube transcript downloads may fail and some web pages may be blocked.
checks: uses --continue-on-error for transcript extraction
preserves or summarizes yt-dlp failures
records blocked, paywalled, unavailable, or partial web pages
does not treat repeated inventory refresh success as proof all extraction succeeded
final recap includes failures, fallbacks, skipped branches, and inventory refresh status
